text:
There once were three men who hunted wolves. They were not cruel men. They often fed the wolves bread. They would often play with their friends, the squirrels.

One day, the squirrels heard some wicked news. Three wolves had come back to the village. They had changed.

One became sweet as pie. All the villagers took her in. The others became monsters. They ate everyone silly. The squirrels didn' want their new friend.

For days, they ran away. They hid behind trees. They pretended they didn't see anything.

Finally, they caught up to one wolf. They took him to the forest. They told the big woodsman about the monstrous wolves. The woodsman agreed.

The next day, the squirrels found themselves walking through a beautiful meadow. The moon was shining.

Just then, two wolves approached. One held berries, the other a big shiny feather.

The squirrels ran.

The wolves stopped.

The squirrels froze.

The wolves just sat
